user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Chanel
Product type: No. 5 perfume fragrance
Tone: elegant, timeless, luxurious
Visual style: A minimalist yet opulent visual style featuring classic black and white contrasts with gold accents, emphasizing sophistication and heritage.
Conceptual technique: iconic celebrity endorsement with aspirational storytelling
Format: image

brief.visual_style: Minimalist yet opulent visual style featuring classic black and white contrasts with gold accents, emphasizing sophistication and heritage.
brief.conceptual_technique: Iconic celebrity endorsement with aspirational storytelling
brief.headline: Timeless Elegance, Immortalized
brief.body_copy: Experience the essence of luxury with Chanel No. 5, the fragrance that transcends generations. Embrace the allure that captivated legends and continues to inspire elegance today.
brief.call_to_action: Discover your legacy with Chanel No. 5.

visual_direction.layout: Centered composition with a black and white portrait of a renowned iconic celebrity known for timeless elegance, subtly overlaid with a golden Chanel No. 5 bottle. The background is stark white to highlight contrasts.
visual_direction.color_palette: Monochrome black and white with strategic gold accents on the perfume bottle and text highlights.
visual_direction.typography: Classic serif font in gold for the headline and call to action, simple sans-serif in black for body copy to balance sophistication with readability.
visual_direction.imagery: Use a high-contrast, elegant black and white photograph of the celebrity in a classic pose that conveys grace and timeless beauty. The Chanel No. 5 bottle should be realistically rendered with a luminous gold sheen, positioned prominently but harmoniously within the frame.
visual_direction.branding: Chanel logo positioned at the bottom center in gold, balanced with minimal legal copy in small, unobtrusive font.
